Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Reroute at Damen/Irving Park
ShortDescription: 50 Damen buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Damen, Montrose, Lincoln, Damen & over normal route, due to street blockage near Damen/Irving Park.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Damen, Montrose, Lincoln, Damen and over normal route, due to street blockage near Damen/Irving Park.

Allow extra travel time.
